blended.narrative: Devil's Head is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 56°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 8" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
